Herald H507

Blocked by geckodriver-reviewers
ActivePublic
Actions

  • Edit Rule
  • Disable Rule

  • Flag For Later
Referenced Files
None
Subscribers
None

Details

Rule Type
Global
Applies To
Differential Revisions

Description

When all of these conditions are met:

Repository is any of rFIREFOXAUTOLAND firefox-autoland
Revision status is not any of Closed, Abandoned, Draft, Changes Planned
Affected files matches regexp @^/testing/(geckodriver|mozbase/rust|webdriver)@

Take these actions the first time this rule matches:

Add blocking reviewers: geckodriver-reviewers.
